prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年天津市综合类最低录取位次分别为约4391名、4761名、4775名、2809名、2568名。2021–2023年位次在4400–4800名区间波动，2024年大幅前移至2809名，2025年进一步前移至2568名，近两年累计前移约2200名，竞争显著加剧。2025年基准位次为2568名；该校在天津市招生计划持续大幅缩减：2021年107人→2022年85人→2023年81人→2024年67人→2025年60人，2026年进一步缩减至31人，较2025年缩招约48.3%。招生计划的大幅减少意味着竞争进一步加剧，录取位次将显著前移。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 大连理工大学是985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2026年主榜第28名，近年排名稳定在28–32名区间，属于国内顶尖工科院校层次；2026年高考周期声誉评价为偏负面，主要涉及录取断档或投档线异常信号（2023年电信学部曾出现位次断档至60000名的舆情）；抖音热度排名第55位（较热），综合热度约56万，短视频平台关注度处于中等偏上水平；历史投档异常记录为低关注级别。声誉偏负面可能对部分考生的报考意愿产生一定抑制；第五轮学科评估中，化学工程与技术获评A+，力学、土木工程、工商管理、机械工程、生物医学工程、管理科学与工程、软件工程获评A，控制科学与工程、环境科学与工程获评A-，A-及以上学科共10个。化工、机械、力学等优势学科与该校在天津招生的电子信息类、智能制造工程、工程力学等专业高度关联，对相关方向考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 2026年专业热度数据显示：电子信息/通信为高热推荐，电气工程及其自动化高热推荐（74.28），计算机类推荐（67.8），人工智能谨慎观望（42.49）。该校在天津招生专业以电子信息类、计算机科学与技术、人工智能、智能制造工程等热门工科为主，专业设置契合当前社会热度方向。天津市2026年高考考生总数约82000人（较2025年71938人增长约14%），考生规模持续扩大，整体竞争加剧；大连理工大学位于辽宁省，属东北地区，在天津市的招生计划从2021年的107人持续缩减至2026年的31人，招生占比逐年下降。对于天津考生而言，该校属于跨省报考，地域偏好上无明显优势或劣势。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次2568名、2026年招生计划大幅缩减48.3%（供需弹性主值1823名）、天津市考生总数增长约14%加剧竞争、声誉偏负面抑制部分热度等因素，预测2026年最低录取位次约1853名，较2025年前移约715名，区间为1642–2064名。招生计划大幅缩减和考生总数增长是推动位次前移的最关键因素，声誉偏负面则起到一定的反向调节作用。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 人工智能（新工科大师班/未来卓越班/创新班）
- 计算机科学与技术（国家基础学科拔尖计划班）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 电子信息类（创新班）
- 智能制造工程（创新班）
- 工程力学（力学工科基础拔尖计划班）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 电子科学与技术（含集成电路设计与集成系统、电子信息材料）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次在1853名附近，区间1642–2064名。位次明显优于区间上限（如1600名以内）可重点冲刺一档的人工智能顶尖班型和计算机拔尖班；位次在区间中段（1700–1900名）建议以二档的电子信息类创新班和智能制造工程创新班为主；位次接近区间下限（2000名左右）可考虑三档的电子科学与技术作为保底。所有专业均要求物理、化学2科必选。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Tianjin comprehensive category were approximately 4391, 4761, 4775, 2809, and 2568 respectively. Rankings fluctuated between 4400–4800 from 2021 to 2023, then significantly advanced to 2809 in 2024 and further to 2568 in 2025, with a cumulative advance of about 2200 positions over the past two years, indicating intensified competition. The baseline ranking for 2025 is 2568. The university's enrollment plan in Tianjin has been continuously and significantly reduced: 107 in 2021 → 85 in 2022 → 81 in 2023 → 67 in 2024 → 60 in 2025, and further reduced to 31 in 2026, a decrease of approximately 48.3% compared to 2025. The substantial reduction in enrollment plan means further intensified competition, and admission rankings will significantly advance.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Dalian University of Technology is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university. It ranks 28th in the main list of the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with stable rankings in the 28–32 range in recent years, belonging to the top-tier engineering universities in China. The reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is slightly negative, mainly involving signals of admission cut-off anomalies or abnormal submission lines (e.g., in 2023, the Faculty of Electronic Information and Electrical Engineering experienced a ranking drop to 60,000). Douyin popularity ranks 55th (relatively hot), with a comprehensive popularity of about 560,000, indicating medium-to-high attention on short video platforms. Historical submission anomaly records are at a low concern level. The slightly negative reputation may suppress some candidates' willingness to apply. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Chemical Engineering and Technology was rated A+, Mechanics, Civil Engineering, Business Administration, Mechanical Engineering, Biomedical Engineering, Management Science and Engineering, and Software Engineering were rated A, and Control Science and Engineering, Environmental Science and Engineering were rated A-, with a total of 10 disciplines rated A- or above. Advantageous disciplines such as Chemical Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, and Mechanics are highly correlated with the majors recruited in Tianjin, such as Electronic Information, Intelligent Manufacturing Engineering, and Engineering Mechanics, strongly attracting candidates in related fields.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: 2026 major popularity data shows: Electronic Information/Communication is highly recommended, Electrical Engineering and Automation is highly recommended (74.28), Computer Science is recommended (67.8), and Artificial Intelligence is cautiously observed (42.49). The majors recruited by the university in Tianjin are mainly popular engineering fields such as Electronic Information, Computer Science and Technology, Artificial Intelligence, and Intelligent Manufacturing Engineering, aligning with current social hot trends. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Tianjin college entrance examination is about 82,000 (an increase of about 14% from 71,938 in 2025), with the candidate scale continuously expanding, intensifying overall competition. Dalian University of Technology is located in Liaoning Province, in the Northeast region. Its enrollment plan in Tianjin has been continuously reduced from 107 in 2021 to 31 in 2026, with the enrollment proportion declining year by year. For Tianjin candidates, this university is a cross-province application, with no obvious advantage or disadvantage in regional preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 2568, the significant reduction of 48.3% in the 2026 enrollment plan (supply-demand elasticity main value 1823), the approximately 14% increase in the total number of Tianjin candidates intensifying competition, and the slightly negative reputation suppressing some popularity, the predicted minimum admission ranking for 2026 is about 1853, advancing about 715 positions from 2025, with a range of 1642–2064. The substantial reduction in enrollment plan and the increase in candidate numbers are the most critical factors driving the ranking advance, while the slightly negative reputation plays a certain counterbalancing role.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult)
- Artificial Intelligence (New Engineering Master Class/Future Excellence Class/Innovation Class)
- Computer Science and Technology (National Basic Discipline Top Talent Program Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Electronic Information (Innovation Class)
- Intelligent Manufacturing Engineering (Innovation Class)
- Engineering Mechanics (Mechanics Engineering Basic Top Talent Program Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy)
- Electronic Science and Technology (including Integrated Circuit Design and Integration System, Electronic Information Materials).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The predicted ranking is around 1853, with a range of 1642–2064. Candidates with rankings significantly better than the upper limit (e.g., within 1600) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 top classes in Artificial Intelligence and Computer Top Talent Program. Candidates with rankings in the middle of the range (1700–1900) are advised to mainly consider Tier 2 Electronic Information Innovation Class and Intelligent Manufacturing Engineering Innovation Class. Candidates with rankings near the lower limit (around 2000) can consider Tier 3 Electronic Science and Technology as a safety option. All majors require both Physics and Chemistry as compulsory subjects.
